annotations.text: The above listed names are sky deity (god) names. All sounds like "TENGRI" TIAN = is one of the oldest Chinese terms for heaven. Means "to Heaven/God" (look the tian symbol, man with 4 hands) on https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tian TIANDI = Means "heaven and earth" or "Hight Lord" RANGI = Means "sky father" in maori mythology ( https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rangi_and_Papa ) SHANGDI = Same as TIAN SHADDAI = Name of God in Israel DINGIR = Sumerian word for "god. means "sky" or "heaven" https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dingir TENGERE = Means also tengri

annotations.text: " Amram ", " Levi " and " Ishmael " are figures in the Torah (and Bible). Three figures in the Torah lived the same number of years (137): Gen 24:17 = “These were the years of the life of Ishmael: one hundred and thirty-seven years; then he breathed his last and died, and was gathered to his kin” Ex. 6:20 = “and the span of Amram’s life was 137 years” Ex. 6:17 = “and the span of Levi’s life was 137 years”

All the given numbers of this calculation are prime numbers ! The result of this calculation is ~ "0.00729735256 ...... ". Physicist like Richard Feynman name this number " God's number ". This calculation is exact the same as 1 / 137.035999173. (137 is the inverse FSC). https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fine-structure_constant The name of this number = "Fine-structure constant" Last ten decimals of 50.000 places = "1515009125"

The result of the calculation (and all numbers are prime numbers!) is exact; 0. 0072973525613766677788831415921618033299792458 (with a period of 46 decimals) (0. 0072973525613766677788831415921618033299792458 007297352561376667778883141592161803329979245800729735256137666777888314159216180332997924580072973525613766677788831415921618033299792458007297352561376667778883141592161803329979245800729735256137666777888314159216180332997924580072973525613766677788831415921618033299792458... and and and...) Let us explain what these numbers may mean; 0.00729735256 = Fine-structure constant 137 = 33th prime, inverse Fine-structure constant (~ 1 / 137) 666 = number of the beast, see here https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/666_(number)#In_religion 777 = number of God, see here https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/777_(number) 888 = number of Jesus, see here https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/888_(number) 3141592 = Pi (π, 3.141592...) 1618033 = Golden ratio (1.618033...) 299792458 = The speed of light in vacuum (299792458 metres per second) The period of 46 decimals is maybe for the number of HUMAN CROMOSOME? This is a powerful message.
